title: helichrysum felinum
intro: Helichrysum felinum, also known as cat's ear, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Helichrysum felinum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum felinum can be found in the form of essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
